calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar May-01-2026 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Aug-04-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Motion To Compel Discovery Responses And Request For Sanctions Against Defendant Frederick Schrunk Dba Thrillhouse Records
Off Calendar Mar-10-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF ASTRID RIVERA'S Motion To Compel Discovery Responses And Request For Sanctions Against Defendant Frederick Schrunk dba Thrillhouse Records.

The unopposed motion for an order compelling discovery responses and sanctions from defendant Frederick Schrunk dba Thrillhouse Records is granted. Plaintiff served form interrogatories, set one; special interrogatories, set one; and request for production of documents, set one on Schrunk on October 29, 2025. (Aria Decl., Ex. A.) Schrunk has not responded. (Id., para. 7.)

Schrunk is ordered to provide complete, verified, objection-free responses by March 30, 2026. (Code Civ. Proc., sec. 2030.290; id., sec. 2031.300.) Plaintiff seeks sanctions. The court shall impose sanctions against a party who unsuccessfully opposes a motion to compel further responses unless it finds that the opposing party's position had substantial justification or other circumstances make imposition of the sanction unjust. (Id., sec. 2030.290, subd. (c); id., sec. 2031.300, subd. (c).) Failure to respond to a discovery motion does not obviate the sanctions request. (Rules of Court, Rule 3.1348, subd. (a).) The court awards $1200 as a reasonable sanction on this motion. Schrunk shall pay the sanction by April 10, 2026.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the Courts ruling.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (301/CVA)
